source_class: user-provided downloaded albedo with deterministic regenerated runtime data maps
target_use: runtime connected-loop Sherman tread segments; one reusable tread shoe PBR set shared by every segment mesh
uv_policy: main outward shoe face samples full 0-1 image; bottom/contact face samples independent full 0-1 image; sides/ends/bevels sample narrow edge strips
metalness_policy: painted-metal metalness map: mostly black painted faces remain dull; narrow exposed edge wear only, still capped by runtime metalness 0.16 so treads do not become shinier than the tank average
color_space_policy: albedo sRGB; normal, roughness, and metalness linear/no color space

tread_shoe_albedo.png.processing: resized to 1024x1024 with Pillow LANCZOS when needed; albedo stored RGBA, data maps stored RGB

tread_shoe_normal.png.processing: regenerated from tread albedo high-frequency plate/edge height; RGB tangent-style normal data map

tread_shoe_roughness.png.processing: regenerated as high-value matte roughness data map; prevents glossy white reflection planes under final lighting

tread_shoe_metalness.png.processing: regenerated as mostly black edge-only painted-metal data map; runtime scalar caps exposed metal at 0.16

roughness_policy: high matte painted-steel roughness map; mostly white data map with localized lower roughness only on worn shoe edges so Three.js roughnessMap no longer multiplies the scalar into a glossy surface
normal_policy: deterministic regenerated normal map from albedo high-frequency shoe plates and edge wear, stronger than the downloaded source normal so highlights break up across each tread shoe
